svg.title: Product Catalog Enrichment Agent flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing the agent pipeline: raw product input goes through image analysis, web research, and spec parsing tools, then enrichment generation, then quality check, and finally outputs enriched catalog data.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does raw product input look like for the catalog enrichment agent?')
sendPrompt('How does the orchestrator agent work in catalog enrichment?')
sendPrompt('How does the image analysis tool work in catalog enrichment?')
sendPrompt('How does web research tool work in the enrichment agent?')
sendPrompt('How does spec parsing work in the catalog enrichment agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the enrichment generation step produce?')
g.text: LLM writes title, desc, tags, SEO

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does quality check work in the catalog enrichment agent?')
sendPrompt('What does the enriched catalog output look like?')
